mapper.sql: A.RSS_ID AS rssId , A.TRGET_SVC_NM AS trgetSvcNm , A.TRGET_SVC_TABLE AS trgetSvcTable , A.HDER_TITLE AS hderTitle , A.HDER_LINK AS hderLink , A.HDER_DC AS hderDescription , A.HDER_TAG AS hderTag , A.BDT_TITLE AS bdtTitle , A.BDT_LINK AS bdtLink , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm

sql.if: AND (A.TRGET_SVC_NM LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}),'%') OR A.HDER_TITLE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}),'%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_RSS A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_RSS A WHERE 1=1
SELECT DISTINCT A.TRGET_SVC_TABLE AS trgetSvcTable , A.TRGET_SVC_NM AS trgetSvcNm FROM TB_RSS A
